one_liner: Toei's frog-eye low angle + hand-brush cumulus sky drama + rubber-elastic anatomy with DIRECTIONAL distortion — face widens HORIZONTALLY, jaw drops below collar, mouth stretches toward ear line.
render_law: Toei Animation bold-cel production frame in the One Piece lineage. Character silhouette is built with 3-5px uniform pure-black outline, no taper, no variation — the line is a declaration, not a description. Fill is 2-value flat cel: saturated mid and deep-saturated marine shadow (never grey, never black fill). Sky is the emotional engine: hand-brush-painted cumulus masses in cream-gold over cobalt-marine, flaring amber-orange at climactic beats; the sky occupies the top two-thirds of the frame while figures tower up from the bottom third against it. Horizon line sits 20-30% from frame bottom — frog-eye camera, steep receding perspective, subjects visually enormous against the world. Anatomical grammar: broad shoulder-to-hip ratio, oversized hands at emotional peak, limbs that rubber-stretch with DIRECTION — horizontal face-widen on reaction (mouth toward ear line, jaw sub-collar), vertical neck-stretch on shock gags, limbs that smear directionally and recoil. The open sea reads deep teal-navy, never resort turquoise. Invented fictional signage — wanted-poster paper, pennants, caravel-hybrid timber hull with carved figurehead — lives inside the frame as dressing, always plausible adventure-world, never canon One Piece. Speed lines are dry-brush scratches; dust and smoke are rough dry-brush shapes; sweat-drops and blush-blocks are flat graphic symbols on the face, not painterly. IMPERATIVE: STRICT PURE 2D CEL SHADING. No 3D, no 2.5D, no subsurface gradient, no realistic anatomy proportion, no pastel or muted tone.
line_grammar: Uniform 3-5px pure-black outline, zero taper, zero weight variation. Silhouette-first — interior line appears only for major muscle definition or a fabric fold under emotional emphasis. Shadow step is flat color, never a line. Face symbols (sweat-drop, blush-block, speed-line burst) are graphic shapes, not drawn detail.
lens_grammar: Simulated 25-35mm from below chest height: steep receding perspective, horizon low in frame (20-30% from bottom). Frog-eye default, comic fish-eye distortion pushed during wide comedy reaction shots. 50mm portrait only for quiet emotional beats. No lens flare, no DOF — full flat 2D depth.
light_law: Hard 2-value cel lighting: mid and shadow step, crisp boundary between them. Shadow tone is deep-saturated marine, never achromatic. Sky is the primary light source and palette engine — gold-cream overhead on adventure beats, amber-orange raking at climactic ones. Hair spec and metal highlights get a single extra light value step. No gradient, no atmospheric fall-off.

palette_lock.bias: poster-primary saturation: marine-blue shadow, primary yellow mid, primary red accent, cream highlight. Open sea = deep teal-navy, never resort turquoise. Sky cumulus = cream-gold to amber-orange at story peaks. NO pastel, NO desaturated wash, NO neon, NO earth-tone muted palette.

motion_cadence: 12fps character animation on 2s. Smear frame at peak action: single frame, multi-ghost limb painted laterally in motion direction. Speed lines during burst. Hard freeze on reaction shot 24-36 frames — hold for beat, then instant cut. Exaggeration reads direction before it reads speed.
negative_lock: NO Luffy, NO Zoro, NO Nami, NO Sanji, NO Chopper, NO Robin, NO Franky, NO Brook, NO Jinbe, NO Ace, NO Shanks, NO Blackbeard, NO any named One Piece character
NO Straw Hat emblem, NO Jolly Roger, NO named pirate crew insignia
NO Grand Line, NO Alabasta, NO Water 7, NO Wano, NO Dressrosa, NO any named One Piece location
NO Devil Fruit visual signature — NO Gomu Gomu rubber-stretch specifically
NO desaturated, muted, or pastel palette
NO slim generic-anime proportions (must have Toei adventure breadth)
NO gradient or airbrush fill — flat 2-value only
NO 3D render, NO cel-shaded 3D, NO 2.5D hybrid
NO realistic anatomy or realistic shading
Turkish label only — bold display letterform with drop shadow, NO English signage
example_injection: Toei Animation bold-cel frame in One Piece production grammar. Frog-eye from knee height: Mamilas character towers at mid-shot, bold 4px pure-black uniform outline, 2-value flat cel — primary-yellow shirt, primary-red sash, deep marine shadow step. Behind: hand-brush-painted cumulus masses in cream-gold over cobalt-marine, horizon at 25% from bottom, open deep-teal-navy sea beneath a wooden dock. Reaction mid-forming: face widening HORIZONTALLY, mouth corner stretching toward right ear line, jaw dropped below collar, eyes ballooned with single huge white spec. An invented wanted-poster (fictional face, ink-stained paper, Turkish text 'ARANIYOR') nailed to a timber mast. Turkish label 'MACERA' as bold-display dry-brush onomatopoeia, upper right, drop shadow. Motion seed: mouth opening into a shout, single-frame dry-brush dust puff kicking at heels. AVOID: Luffy, Straw Hat, Jolly Roger, gradient fill, realistic anatomy, pastel tone, English signage. Clean motion-ready start frame.

one_liner: Ufotable's 3-layer composite: strict 2D cel character over hand-painted-over 3D background, topped by fluid-sim + hand-keyed effects that dwarf the cel figure in luminous scale.
render_law: Ufotable studio production frame in the Kimetsu no Yaiba / Fate Zero lineage. THREE DISTINCT RENDER LAYERS composited together — this is the Ufotable signature, not optional decoration. Layer 1 — Character Cel: strict 2D cel with crisp uniform 2px black line (zero taper, zero weight variation on body), 3-value flat fill (highlight/mid/shadow), shadow value is a warm-cool midtone, never achromatic grey or pure black fill. Cel skin has a single warm mid-value and one painted cool-rim accent — no subsurface scattering, no CG shading bleed onto the character layer. Layer 2 — Background Environment: full 3D-modeled geometry (architecture, foliage, rock, water surface) rendered and then hand-painted-over to produce a luminous, tactile look — painted wet highlights on stone, moss texture that reads brushed, volumetric god-ray shafts with visible particulate atmosphere. This layer has genuine depth, parallax on slow pan, and dew or moisture on surface materials. It must NOT look like raw octane/V-Ray output. Layer 3 — Effects: this is the Ufotable crown — digital fluid simulation (water ribbon, flame surge, energy slash) composited over and behind the character, drawn with hand-keyed anchor frames blended with the sim output. Effects generate their own light: fire rim-fills the character from below, water reflection throws cool caustics upward. Effect scale often EXCEEDS the character — the water form towers over the figure, the flame column rises past the frame top. Hanafuda-influenced particle clusters (concentric petals, spiral dot-burst) are a recognizable atmospheric texture. Post: filmic curve, warm highlight protection, cool shadow push, mild bloom on practical sources, 2.35:1 letterbox common. IMPERATIVE: THREE-LAYER COMPOSITE IS THE RULE. Character = strict 2D cel (no CG shading). Background = painted-over 3D (not flat 2D, not raw CG). Effects = fluid-sim + hand-key composite (not cartoon sparkle).
line_grammar: Character layer: crisp 2px uniform black line on body and face, zero taper. Interior lines minimal — only anatomy fold that affects silhouette. Hair lines tight and parallel within volume. Effects layer has its own brush-textured contour line: water ribbon shows wet-edge fringe, flame shows torn painterly edge — these lines are NOT the same as character cel lines.
lens_grammar: Simulated 40-85mm anamorphic feel, 2.35:1 letterbox option on action sequences. Character close-up simulates f/2.8 shallow with painted background softening. Wide environment simulates f/8 full-depth parallax pan. Bloom on high-energy practical sources (lantern, moon, effects). Mild chromatic aberration at effect layer edges only.
light_law: Single motivated key with volumetric god-ray shafts and visible particulate atmosphere. Warm key rim on character from primary motivated source. Cool ambient fill on the shadow side. Effects carry their own light and project back onto the character: fire glow is a warm face-fill from below, water splash throws cool-blue caustic scatter upward onto chin and forearms. Dew and moisture on stone and leaf surfaces catches the god-ray as micro-specular. Particulates (dust, petal, ember) always present in the air column.

palette_lock.bias: cool blue-slate shadow (Layer 2 background depth), warm fire-amber OR teal-water accent (Layer 3 effects — pick one per scene, not both), cream-warm highlight. Character cel shadow is desaturated warm-cool midtone, NOT the deep background blue. Hanafuda-influenced particle accents: rose-pink petal clusters, deep indigo dot-burst. NO neon, NO desaturated flat wash, NO raw-CG plastic grey.

motion_cadence: 24fps camera. Character cel on 12fps limited animation (2s). Effects layer at 24fps full simulation — the contrast between limited cel and full-rate effects is deliberate and signature. 1-frame painted smear at peak impact within the effects layer. 2-3 second hold after a signature technique completes — character stands still while particles settle. God-ray shafts breathe (slow pulse, 48-60 frame cycle).
negative_lock: NO Tanjiro, NO Nezuko, NO Zenitsu, NO Inosuke, NO Giyu, NO Rengoku, NO Muzan, NO any named Demon Slayer character
NO Taisho-era Japan, NO cedar forest, NO Mount Natagumo, NO Infinity Castle, NO any named Demon Slayer location
NO checkered green-black haori pattern, NO Nichirin sword, NO hanafuda earrings
NO named breathing style visual signature (Water Breathing dragon form, Flame Breathing, etc.) — effects must be abstract fluid or user-directed
NO fully 3D CGI character — character MUST be strict 2D cel on Layer 1
NO CG shading bleed onto character cel (no subsurface, no normal-map shading on skin or hair)
NO raw octane/V-Ray CG background — background MUST read hand-painted-over
NO cartoon sparkle effects — effects must read as fluid-sim or hand-keyed fluid motion
Turkish label only — brush-kanji-inspired stroke geometry allowed, NO English signage
example_injection: Ufotable 3-layer composite frame in Kimetsu no Yaiba production grammar. LAYER 1 — Mamilas character mid-shot at 2.35:1 letterbox: 2px crisp uniform black line, 3-value warm-cool cel skin, cool-slate shadow side. LAYER 2 — painted-over 3D Istanbul stone bridge at night: hand-brushed wet highlights on mossy granite, volumetric god-ray shaft from a lantern to camera-right cutting through particulate mist, dew micro-specular on every surface edge. LAYER 3 — water ribbons rising off the rain-slicked bridge surface, fluid-sim contour with wet-edge brush fringe, reflecting the lantern warm-amber onto character forearms from below as cool-caustic scatter; hanafuda-petal particle clusters orbiting the effect periphery. Bloom on lantern source. Turkish label 'KÖPRÜ' brush-inked on a wooden post, kanji-inspired stroke weight. Motion seed: character mid-exhale, warm breath mist mid-cycle, water ribbons in expansion phase. AVOID: Tanjiro, checkered haori, Nichirin sword, named breathing styles, raw CG background, CG shading on character skin, cartoon sparkle. Clean motion-ready start frame.

one_liner: Pixar's appeal-driven shape language: subsurface-scatter skin, squash-stretch physics with follow-through, art-directed warm-key + complementary-bounce — every material reads tactile before it reads rendered.
render_law: Feature-animation 3D CGI in the Pixar RenderMan / Renderman-successor pipeline lineage of Toy Story 4, Onward, Luca, and Elemental. The Pixar signature is NOT 'cute 3D' — it is a specific formal grammar: appeal-driven silhouette design (shapes composed for emotional read at 50px thumbnail), subsurface scattering on character skin that carries the scene's light temperature (warm honey SSS under tungsten, cool ivory SSS under daylight, amber-bronze SSS under sodium), wet dual-point specular on eyes with painted-in iris depth, and physically-motivated bounce fill. Every prop has a deliberate overscale factor (10-15%) for child-safe readability — a pencil is thumb-width, a bowl is head-width. Material specificity is non-negotiable: wood shows visible grain with satin-varnish sheen, fabric shows woven stitch texture and slight fiber fray at edges, metal shows anisotropic brushed highlight, rubber has soft-diffuse sheen with slight translucency at thin edges. Lighting grammar is art-directed, not photo-random: single motivated key (window sun at 45°, practical lamp at 60°, monitor glow from below), complementary bounce fill at 25-35% intensity in the key's opposing hue, rim accent in palette's saturated accent color, painted soft ambient occlusion in corner and fold pockets — never hard-black shadow. Composition: character at focal plane sharp at f/4 equivalent, background falling into gentle focus falloff. Squash-stretch physics govern all character and prop motion: every pickup has anticipation, every landing has squash, every fast move has follow-through smear. IMPERATIVE: FULL 3D CGI FEATURE-ANIMATION RENDER — continuous physically-based shading, painterly AO, SSS skin. Strictly forbid 2D cel shading, hard black outlines, flat graphic fill, clay/plasticine surface texture on character skin.
line_grammar: No outlines — silhouette reads entirely through lighting rim and value separation. Shadow edges are soft, never hard-step. Ambient occlusion painted in, never raytraced-hard. The shape carries via appeal geometry, not line.
lens_grammar: 35mm to 50mm equivalent focal length. f/4 on mid-shots, f/2.8 on character close-up, f/5.6 on environment establisher. Vision3 250D color science: neutral-warm film curve with fine grain (16mm-equivalent grain floor, mostly in shadow). Gentle racks on focal plane shifts. No lens flare unless motivated by a visible practical light source in frame. No anamorphic streak.
light_law: Single motivated key from a real-world source visible or strongly implied in frame (window sun, desk lamp, overhead classroom fluorescent, screen glow). Complementary bounce fill at 25-35% key intensity, in the key's opposing hue temperature — warm key produces cool-violet bounce, cool daylight key produces warm-honey bounce. Rim accent in the palette's saturated accent tone. Painted soft AO in corner pockets, floor-join, and fabric folds — ambient shadow reads warm-dark, never cold-black.

palette_lock.bias: warm-honey SSS dominant on skin; complementary cool-violet bounce in shadow; wood tones in brown-ochre range with satin sheen; fabric in warm-saturated primaries with fiber texture. NO acid green, NO neon, NO teal-orange Hollywood grade, NO desaturated grey anywhere in character or environment.

motion_cadence: Squash-stretch physics on every character and prop action: anticipation wind-up, peak action with directional smear, follow-through overshoot, settle with secondary motion. Emotional hold: 12-18 frames on a significant look before the cut. Eye darts before the action — character looks where the action will happen 3-4 frames ahead. Prop pickups have moment-of-contact squash. Walk cycles show weight: pelvis dips on each step, shoulder counter-rotates. 24fps cadence.
negative_lock: NO Woody, NO Buzz, NO Elsa, NO Anna, NO Moana, NO Bing Bong, NO Merida, NO Wall-E, NO any named Pixar or Disney animated character
NO Radiator Springs, NO Monstropolis, NO Arendelle, NO Pixar City, NO any named Pixar/Disney location
NO clay or plasticine character skin — skin MUST be Pixar SSS-shaded, not clay (clay is only a prop material if the clay_hamur material is active)
NO hard cel shading, NO cartoon black outline, NO anime-style eye geometry
NO flat graphic fill, NO toon shader, NO 2D illustration style on 3D forms
NO teal-orange Hollywood grade, NO desaturated look, NO high-contrast noir
Turkish label only — blocky dimensional letterform, raised and legible, NO English signage
NO octane-render aesthetic (avoid: harsh physical sky, raw caustics, overly sharp AO)
example_injection: Feature-animation 3D CGI frame in the Pixar Onward/Luca pipeline. Single motivated key: warm window sun from camera-right at 45°, cool-violet complementary bounce from left at 30% intensity, tangerine-amber rim accent from low right. Focal plane at f/4: Mamilas character mid-shot, appeal-rounded silhouette, SSS skin reading honey-warm under the tungsten key, dual-point wet eye spec, soft painted AO under the chin. Props: wooden classroom desk shows brown-ochre grain with satin varnish sheen, a thick primary-red pencil (15% overscale) resting diagonally. Character posing: squash landing into the seat, follow-through in the shoulders still settling. Background: soft f/4 falloff onto a warm classroom wall with chalkboard — painted AO in the corner join. Turkish label 'ALTI' as a blocky raised wooden numeral on the desk edge, legible from frame edge. Motion seed: one frame before the character's hand closes around the pencil — anticipation micro-pullback visible. AVOID: Woody, Buzz, Pixar franchise names, clay skin on character, cel outline, teal-orange grade, English signage. Clean motion-ready start frame.

one_liner: Miyazaki's hand-painted grammar: sculptural cumulus masses with modeled grey-violet undersides rule the upper two-thirds of frame; wind is a visible actor; a lovingly hand-crafted machine stands in silhouette against the living landscape.
render_law: Traditional 2D animation frame in the Hayao Miyazaki lineage of pastoral hand-painted theatrical features — grammar from the late-80s through 90s Toho/Tokuma production era of hand-painted pastoral theatrical features. Character key is hand-inked at 2-3px, confident and uninterrupted, tapered at the very ends, dark-warm-brown (never pure black) — the line breathes with the character's anatomy without being a blueprint. Fills are flat cel in 2-3 value steps with matte finish. Backgrounds are watercolor and gouache over pencil-ruled layout: visible brush marks, wet-into-wet bleeds at foliage edges, paper tooth catching raking light as micro-texture across the painted surface; foliage is painted as clustered brush-stroke masses, not leaf-by-leaf. The three Miyazaki-specific signatures that a true expert checks for: (1) CLOUDS — painted as sculptural solid masses with fully modeled undersides showing grey-violet shadow and cream-lit tops — sky architecture with physical weight, not backdrop decoration. Sky plus nature field claims the majority of the frame while the character holds the lower quarter. (2) WIND — a visible actor at all times: grass bends in a slow coordinated wave, hair and cloth lift in 8-frame loop cycles, seeds or petals carry laterally. (3) HAND-CRAFTED MACHINE — a lovingly drawn fictional mechanical device stands in silhouette dialogue against the living landscape — wooden flying rig, copper water wheel, iron locomotive, cast-brass clockwork — always fictional, always at human scale, always in silhouette at sky edge. Additional markers: dust motes float in god-ray shafts through interior spaces; food is drawn with glossy appetite specificity (steam curls, condensation on glass, butter sheen on bread); children move with true body-weight lean into effort; the pace has ma — the deliberate breathing pause of held composition before motion resumes. Character cel values are chosen to sit visually inside the painted background, never on top of it. IMPERATIVE: STRICT PURE 2D CEL over painted watercolor-gouache backgrounds. Forbid 3D forms, CGI shading, gradient airbrush cel, neon color.
line_grammar: Hand-inked line 2-3px, confident, uninterrupted, tapered at both ends. Color is dark-warm-brown, not pure black. Interior fold lines appear only where anatomy demands — shoulder joint, knee fold, collar fall — and they are thinner (1.5px equivalent) than the outline. Background has NO outlines — painted edge and value separation only. Effects (water, fire, wind) have loose, calligraphic brush-stroke contour that matches the background's brush energy.
lens_grammar: Flat 2D composition — no physical lens DOF or flare. Simulated 'depth' via painted atmospheric perspective: far objects lose saturation and gain blue-grey aerial haze, never blurred. Paper grain overlay subtle across whole frame. 4:3 or 1.85:1 aspect. Colour space: slightly warm-shifted, film-print feel (Fuji stock aesthetic — slightly less saturated than pure digital, slightly warm highlights).
light_law: Motivated natural light only — window shaft at golden hour, leaf-filtered dapple, lantern glow, moon. Shadow side receives warm ambient reflection (painted reflected sky, reflected earth tone), never grey or cool-neutral. God-ray dust motes when a light shaft is present — painted as individual small ovals, not a glow layer. Rim light on hair edges and grass blade tips. Interior scenes: warm tungsten practical motivates shadow direction; cool blue moonlight or blue-white snow light as opposite.

palette_lock.bias: sage-green + honey-cream + terracotta-red + sky-cobalt — Fuji-stock film warmth. Sky cobalt to cream-white in cumulus gradient. Shadow warm-brown, not neutral-grey. NO neon, NO teal-orange Hollywood grade, NO pure desaturated grey, NO acid-bright primary.

motion_cadence: 8-frame wind cycles: grass, hair, cloth all move in coordinated lateral drift, same timing. Ma pause: after a significant action, character holds completely still 24-36 frames — the world keeps breathing (wind, dust, drifting leaves) while the character is still. Breath cycle on character 24 frames (visible chest rise, nostril micro-flare). Walk cycle at 12fps limited animation feel — arms swinging with counter-rotation, body-weight lean slightly forward into effort. Eye blink at natural interval (every 90-150 frames).
negative_lock: NO Totoro, NO Chihiro, NO Kiki, NO Ponyo, NO Howl, NO Ashitaka, NO San, NO Nausicaa, NO any named Ghibli character
NO Spirit World bathhouse, NO Cat Bus, NO Spirited Away train, NO Valley of the Wind, NO any named Ghibli location
NO CGI shading on any element, NO 3D bevel, NO cel-shaded 3D render
NO neon color, NO Hollywood teal-orange grade, NO digital-clean gradient
NO airbrush gradient fill on character cel (flat matte 2-3 value only)
Wind MUST be present and directional — NO windless static composition
Sky MUST carry sculptural cumulus with modeled underside — NO empty flat blue sky
Turkish label only — ink brush-lettering style integrated into the environment, NO English signage
example_injection: Hand-drawn 2D frame in the Hayao Miyazaki lineage. Mamilas character (dark-warm-brown 2-3px tapered line, warm honey cel skin, 3-value flat fill) stands small at lower-right third of a summer meadow — upper two-thirds is sky ruled by sculptural cumulus masses, cream-lit tops, grey-violet modeled undersides, painted wet-edge brush over paper tooth. Wind acting: sage-green grass masses bend in coordinated left-to-right 8-frame wave, character's cloth and hair lifted in same rhythm. At frame left, a fictional wooden flying rig with copper tube fittings stands in silhouette against the valley — no brand, no canon IP, human-scale. God-ray shaft from cloud gap hits the rig's right spar; dust motes as individual painted ovals in the shaft. Warm afternoon amber light motivates shadow direction; reflected earth-green fills the shadow side warmly. Turkish label 'DOĞU' ink-brushed in brush-lettering style on a weathered wooden signpost. Ma seed: character fully still mid-exhale, 8 frames into the wind cycle, cloth lifting, rig trembling on the threshold of catching the wind. AVOID: Totoro, Chihiro, Cat Bus, bathhouse, CGI shading, flat blue sky, windless frame, English signage. Clean motion-ready start frame.

one_liner: Fortiche's painterly-3D hybrid: 3D-modeled forms surface-shaded with visible oil-paint brush stroke at every silhouette edge — no black anywhere, shadow-side is deep violet, painted highlights that ignore physical light math.
render_law: Fortiche painterly-3D hybrid rendering as developed by Fortiche Production for the Arcane series. This is a precise formal system, not 'anime-ish' — the grammar is industrial European painterly, not Japanese: (1) FORMS: full 3D geometry, but surface shading is a painted oil-texture layer — brush strokes are visible at every silhouette edge, their direction following the form's curvature but inconsistently, as if a painter made deliberate choices rather than a renderer solving physics. (2) COLOUR LAW: there is no black anywhere in this world. The deepest shadow is a rich deep violet. Skin shadow is rosewood-plum, architectural shadow is indigo-violet, cloth shadow is aubergine. (3) HIGHLIGHTS: painted-in manually, NOT following physical light math exactly — highlight placement emphasizes the emotional reading of the form (the cheekbone lit even when key is behind the subject, the knuckle catching a gleam on the swing). (4) SURFACE SPECIFICITY: skin has painted-in blush and pore mark visible at close-up, not subsurface scattering. Hair reads as sculpted painted volume — individual strands are grouped into painted clumps, each clump receiving a single highlight stroke. Fabric shows woven texture painted, not cloth-sim. (5) ENVIRONMENT: chunky mid-poly architecture with surface painting of grime strata, rust oxidation pattern, and iridescent oil-slick streaks on wet stone — a deep-industrial undercity aesthetic of chemical-district grime, never any named franchise district. Every metal surface carries thin-film interference rainbow spec. Background compresses into painterly matte with visible brushwork — never crisp photographic detail, never clean CGI surface. (6) POST: Vision3 500T film stock emulation — warm-highlight / cool-shadow curve, halation blooming on any pixel above 90% luminance (light sources bloom into surrounding haze), subtle chromatic aberration at high-contrast silhouette edges, 35mm-equivalent grain floor present but refined. IMPERATIVE: FORTICHE PAINTERLY-3D HYBRID. 3D forms with hand-painted surface shading, 2D-animated FX layer on top. FORBID: flat cel shading, clean untextured CGI, photoreal live-action light math, standard anime eye geometry, pure black.
line_grammar: No hard cel outline anywhere. Silhouette carries entirely through painted edge — the brush stroke itself IS the boundary, weight varies from 2px at low emotional intensity to 5px at high, direction follows the form. Interior 'lines' are painted shadow steps: a steep value jump that reads as line at distance but resolves to brushwork at close. Shadow-side rim is painted deep violet, not inked. Effects layer (energy, fire, sparks) has its own distinct loose calligraphic brush contour that contrasts with the controlled character silhouette.
lens_grammar: 35mm to 50mm portrait range. f/2.8 character close-up, f/4 mid-shot, f/5.6 wide establisher. Vision3 500T characteristic curve: warm highlight (+15 orange shift above 70% luminance), cool shadow (cyan push below 30%), halation blooming on anything above 90% luminance. 35mm grain floor present and refined. Mild chromatic aberration (1-2px lateral shift at silhouette). No anamorphic streak. 1.78:1 or 2.00:1 aspect.
light_law: Single motivated key direction — warm industrial lantern, cool exterior moon, neon-adjacent accent from a painted window. Bounce fill is in the key's complementary hue from the palette: magenta key bounces teal fill, teal key bounces magenta fill. Rim accent color is always from the palette's jewel-tone (never white, never warm neutral). Ambient occlusion is painted soft and warm-dark, never a hard black AO contact shadow. Halation blooms on all practical sources in frame. Painted indirect-light from windows and lamps bleeds warm halos onto proximate geometry.

palette_lock.bias: deep-violet shadow + jewel-teal mid + magenta-pink accent + warm-cream highlight. Thin-film rainbow spec on all metal. Grime palette: rust-orange, oxidized copper, oil-slick iridescent (context-dependent). NO earth green, NO primary red, NO pure orange (flame accent only, single instance), NO black anywhere in the frame, NO standard-anime flat cel color.

motion_cadence: Deliberate 24fps with hand-animated painted smear frames at peak action — 2-3 consecutive frames with painted directional motion streak visible as brushwork, not motion-blur. 1.5-2 second hold on emotional beat — character studies the situation, eyes tracking. Slow-in / slow-out weight. Momentum carries: a punch's aftershock ripples through cloth and hair for 4-6 frames after impact. No motion blur — smears are painted.
negative_lock: NO Jinx, NO Vi, NO Caitlyn, NO Jayce, NO Viktor, NO Silco, NO Ekko, NO Heimerdinger, NO Vander, NO Powder, NO any named Arcane character
NO Piltover, NO Zaun, NO Undercity, NO Hexgate, NO The Last Drop, NO Piltover Academy, NO any named Arcane location
NO Hextech crystal (blue glowing gem device), NO shimmer substance (iridescent purple glow serum)
NO pure black anywhere in the frame — deepest shadow is deep violet
NO hard cel outline, NO standard anime flat-color shading
NO earth green, NO pure orange (flame accent excepted), NO sepia-brown palette
NOT anime — this is European industrial painterly, NOT Japanese animation grammar
Turkish label only — hand-painted brush lettering with visible uneven stroke edge, NO English signage
example_injection: Fortiche painterly-3D hybrid frame in Arcane production grammar. Oil-paint texture on every surface, brush stroke visible at silhouette. Subject: Mamilas character mid-close-up — painted-blush skin at cool rosewood midtone under a teal practical key, shadow side deep violet (no black), painted cheekbone highlight that slightly exceeds physical expectation, magenta rim from camera-right. Hair: sculpted painted volume, clumps with individual painted highlight strokes. Background: chunky mid-poly rooftop geometry surface-painted with rust oxidation and iridescent oil-streak on rain-wet stone, warm lantern-bloom halation in mid-ground, teal night sky with painted-in stars, Vision3 500T warm-highlight / cool-shadow curve visible in grade. Chromatic aberration 1px at rim-light silhouette edge. Turkish label 'KUZEY' hand-painted on rusted iron: uneven stroke edges, slight impasto build. Motion seed: eye flicking toward off-camera sound — painted iris smear, 2 frames wide, directional. AVOID: Jinx, Hextech crystal, Piltover, black shadow, cel outline, earth green, anime flat color, English signage. Clean motion-ready start frame.

one_liner: Deakins' motivated-single-source discipline: one practical or natural key, genuine negative fill into true black point, shadow side of subject is dark and stays dark — 2.39:1 anamorphic, ARRI Alexa 65 grain floor, zero Hollywood teal-orange excess.
render_law: Photoreal cinematography in the Roger Deakins ASC BSC production lineage of 1917, Blade Runner 2049, Skyfall, Sicario, No Country for Old Men. The Deakins signature is a DISCIPLINE OF RESTRAINT, not a look — it is what he refuses that defines the image: (1) SINGLE MOTIVATED SOURCE — every photon in the frame is traceable to a practical or natural light source that is visible or strongly implied in-frame: window sun, tungsten desk lamp, sodium street lamp, fire, moon. If a source is not visible, its fixture is present somewhere in the scene (the lamp is just off-frame but its spill is clean and directional). Fill light is ONLY what bounces off a real visible surface — a white wall at 30° from key, the ground, the underside of a table. (2) NEGATIVE FILL — the shadow side of the subject is NOT lifted. Contrast ratio 4:1 to 6:1 is typical; the shadow side of a face often goes to below-18-grey and sometimes to near-black. This is intentional and primary — the darkness IS the image. (3) CAMERA DISCIPLINE — locked-off or slow deliberate dolly at 2-5mph, never exceeding what a skilled grip could push on a Mitchell dolly. No handheld organic-vérité movement. The camera is pre-determined — Deakins knows every position before the shot, and the framing is final at the start of the take. (4) COMPOSITION — a small figure in a large environment. Deakins frequently composes a solitary subject occupying 10-20% of the frame against a vast sky, a long corridor, a horizon plain. Negative space is structural, not empty. (5) ASPECT AND OPTICS — 2.39:1 anamorphic feel using Master Anamorphic or Hawk V-lite primes: horizontal lens streak flare from bright practicals is present but refined (not an Abrams-style flare, but a subtle organic streak that registers as a real optical artifact). ARRI Alexa 65 sensor: fine organic grain, wide tonal latitude from deep shadow to protected highlight, no digital clipping hardness. (6) GRADE — naturalistic, not stylized: warm highlights, cool shadows, skin tone accurate to source light temperature (sodium = amber skin, daylight = neutral skin, tungsten = warm skin), but midtones NEVER pushed into teal. No Hollywood teal-orange excess. IMPERATIVE: Absolute realism with motivated-single-source discipline. Forbid fill-flash flat lighting, handheld shake, Hollywood teal-orange grade, plastic AI glow skin, neon, fluorescent green.
line_grammar: N/A — photoreal. No drawn lines. Silhouette reads entirely via light: the bright key side defines the form edge against background, the shadow side dissolves into the background darkness. Deep focus edges are natural optical transitions, not drawn. Skin micro-texture (pore, beard shadow, fine line) is present at close-up from the ARRI sensor's fine grain resolve.
lens_grammar: Master Anamorphic primes: 40mm, 50mm, 65mm most common. f/2.8 for character isolation (rare — Deakins prefers contextual depth), f/4-f/5.6 standard, f/8-f/11 for vast environment frames. 2.39:1 aspect. Horizontal streak flare from practicals: present, 1-2 stops above exposure on the source, refined organic streak NOT a cartoon ray. ARRI Alexa 65 sensor: organic fine grain (most visible in shadows and skin shadow-side), deep DR, no clipping harshness in highlight rolloff. Mild chromatic aberration at extreme field edges only.
light_law: Single motivated key source (practical or natural, visible or implied). Bounce fill only: off a real surface at a real angle — white wall, ground, underside of architectural overhang. Shadow side into deep territory: 4:1 contrast standard, 6:1 at dramatic peaks. Practicals in-frame composed and exposed at 1 stop above key — the lamp is a visual element, not a light meter target. Highlights protected — Deakins rates the Alexa at 800 ISO and reserves headroom: highlights roll off organically, never clip. All skin tone accurate to the source's color temperature, never color-corrected to a standard beauty look.

palette_lock.bias: earth-natural: umber, ochre, olive-neutral, sky-grey. Accent = single warm practical (tungsten amber, fire orange, sodium yellow — pick one per scene). Skin follows source temperature: sodium yields amber-cast, tungsten yields warm-honey, daylight yields neutral-beige. NO teal-orange Hollywood grade (shadow never pushed to cyan), NO neon, NO fluorescent, NO saturated primary, NO clean-white fill.

motion_cadence: Locked-off preferred. Slow deliberate dolly at 2-4 seconds to traverse the frame width — no acceleration, constant speed as if on a motorized head. Long take: cuts are rare, the camera watches the scene unfold rather than editing rhythm imposing itself. When the camera does move, the movement is pre-determined and final — no reframing in post. Breathing room: at least 2-3 seconds of held frame before and after any significant action.
negative_lock: NO Ryan Gosling K, NO Rick Deckard, NO James Bond, NO Anton Chigurh, NO any named Deakins-shot character
NO Blade Runner Los Angeles, NO 1917 trench system, NO Skyfall Glencoe, NO No Country for Old Men Texas highway, NO any named Deakins-shot location
NO handheld shake, NO Steadicam drift, NO vérité camera movement of any kind
NO Hollywood teal-orange grade — shadow NEVER pushed to cyan, midtones NEVER split-toned
NO fill-flash, NO flat even lighting, NO lifted shadow fill that opens up the dark side
NO neon, NO fluorescent green, NO oversaturated primary color
NO rim-light as decoration (rim only when motivated by a real source behind the subject)
NO AI plastic-smooth skin — skin must show micro-texture, pore, and light fall-off
Turkish label only — naturalistic signage weathered and integrated into real environment, NO English signage
example_injection: Photoreal cinematography in the Roger Deakins ASC/BSC production discipline. Locked-off frame. 2.39:1 anamorphic aspect. 50mm Master Anamorphic at f/4. Single motivated key: sodium street lamp below and to camera-left, casting amber light upward at 30° — source implied by its spill angle, no fill added. Subject: Mamilas character at medium distance (occupying 20% of frame height), standing at the edge of a wide Istanbul rooftop at dusk, shadow side of face and body going to near-black (5:1 contrast ratio), amber sodium key on key-side cheekbone and shoulder. Background: vast sky at civil twilight — deep grey-blue, no orange gradient (source is below, not behind). Foreground: rust-textured metal railing catching a 1-stop horizontal streak flare from the sodium source below, refined and organic. ARRI Alexa 65 fine grain visible in the deep shadow areas and railing shadow. Turkish label 'İSTANBUL' as weathered painted letters on a distant rooftop structure, faded and barely legible at this scale. Motion seed: character mid-exhale, cigarette smoke drifting upward and catching the sodium amber on its first foot of rise. AVOID: Ryan Gosling, Blade Runner LA, teal-orange grade, any fill light on shadow side, handheld shake, neon, AI plastic skin. Clean motion-ready start frame.
